num-active-users.title: Role can't be deleted
num-active-users.description_one: One user is assigned to this role. Please assign those users to a different role.
num-active-users.description_other: {{count}} users are assigned to this role. Please assign those users to a different role.

num-active-api-keys.title: Role can't be deleted
num-active-api-keys.description_one: One API key is active on this role. Please assign a different role to this API key.
num-active-api-keys.description_other: {{count}} API keys are active on this role. Please assign different roles to these API keys.
